tag-lens.commands.rescanWorkspace.title: Tag Lens: Rescan Workspace
tag-lens.configuration.tags.title: Tags
tag-lens.configuration.tags.markdownDesc: The list of tags to locate
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].pattern.m: The pattern to match for this tag
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].isRegex.m: `true` if `pattern` is a regular expression; `false` if `pattern` is plain text
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].isRegexMu: `true` if `pattern` is a regular expression and will be allowed to span multiple lines; otherwise `false`
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].decoratio: One of the names from #tag-lens.styles# to modify this tag visually
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].decorateC: Indicate a capture group to be decorated. Will decorate entire `$0` by default.
tag-lens.configuration.tags[*].diagnosti: A diagnostic severity level to apply to the matched tag

A custom message to display on the diagnostic, defaulting to the matched text.

`$n` and `$<name>` replacements are supported when using a regular expression pattern. They are replaced using capture groups from the match. Missing capture groups or names are replaced with empty strings.

A literal `$` can be inserted using `$$`.
tag-lens.configuration.styles.title: Styles
tag-lens.configuration.styles[*].foregro: A hex color to apply to the text
tag-lens.configuration.styles[*].backgro: A hex color to apply to the background
tag-lens.configuration.compactFolders.ma: Compact folders in tree view like #explorer.compactFolders#
